nodes.title: TRUE = SET UP CACHE; FALSE  = RUN WORKFLOW
CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
A 3D rendered scene of a cute and youthful green-eyed platinum blonde doll walking the runway at a high end fashion show. She has realistic proportions and human-scale eyes. She has nice nice soft rounded features and an hourglass figure, with big breasts, a narrow waist, wide hips, and strong but lean legs. She is wearing a spectacular pink and silver negligee. Her wavy long hair is that of a true blonde with light blonde roots, and is worn in an elegant messy updo that resolves in two long ponytails, and has soft pink and faint powder blue highlights. She is wearing dark eyeshadow that highlights her vibrant eyes; her eyebrows are light blond, matching her natural blond hair. She is wearing silver high heel open toe sandals. She is wearing cute hoop silver earrings and matching choker and hoop bracelets.

On the viewer’s left, her anatomical right hand firmly holds a large, lush bouquet of many red roses, approximately twelve prominent rose blossoms, with abundant green leaves and gathered stems. The full bouquet fills the masked area and is clearly gripped in her hand.

The fashion show is elegantly lit, but the background is somewhat in the shaadow, such that the blonde stands out as focus of attention. The background is subtly in soft focus.

nodes.title: TRUE = SET UP CACHE FOR SPEEDUP; FALSE  = RUN WORKFLOW

groups.title: Setting Up the Hint Latent Cache at First Run Helps Low VRAM Systems Avoid Memory Churn
